source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Efficient infrastructure UI typography with English and Japanese guidance for service dashboards, command palettes, status labels, monitoring tables, audit logs, forms, and calm approval states.
layout: Stable 8px product grids, compact infrastructure dashboards, service dependency diagrams, dense tables, restrained forms, cedar-needle texture bands, and 8px cards and controls.

prompts.label: Transparent cedar spray motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a cedar branch spray, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One natural cedar forest branch spray with layered blue-green cedar needles/scales, small articulated twig structure, cedar-brown bark stems, cool forest-blue shadowing, subtle resinous highlights, accurate cedar spray form, stable infrastructure system mood through calm order and branching structure.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; do not crop the branch; diagonal branch spray with visible main stem and several smaller sprays, but keep it simple enough for a clean cutout.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves blue-green cedar sprays, cedar brown bark, forest-neutral shadows, and crisp needle silhouette detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no forest landscape, no decorative background, no second branch, no flowers, no berries, no cones unless tiny and incidental, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cedar Spray light-mode design-system board
Input image: the visible transparent cedar spray motif is the source reference.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Cedar Spray", derived from the visible isolated cedar branch spray. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible stable infrastructure system.
Reference use: Use the visible cedar spray motif as the source of truth. Extract blue-green cedar foliage, cool spruce-blue shadows, cedar-brown bark stems, forest neutral surfaces, structured branching rhythm, layered needle texture, and calm infrastructure logic. The board must visibly respect these motif colors and textures.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cedar Spray, Cedar Branch, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: blue green cedar primary, deep cedar-shadow ink, cedar brown bark accents, cool forest-neutral background, pale lichen surface, misted blue-green panels, bark-tan borders, and restrained infrastructure status accents derived only from the motif.
Typography: stable infrastructure product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use an efficient grotesk or humanist sans for interface headings and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for Japanese headings, body, labels, search, monitoring, tables, forms, and incident status. Include short Japanese labels such as 基盤, 検索, 状態, 記録, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, uptime chart, service dependency graph, throughput bars, infrastructure table, audit log table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple restrained icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Style: premium product design system, quiet stable infrastructure dashboard, pale forest-neutral surfaces, blue-green primary actions, deep cedar active navigation, cedar-bark focus and selected states, subtle overlapping cedar-needle texture, calm hierarchy, compact data density, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Cedar Spray", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cedar Spray dark-mode design-system board
Input images: the visible transparent cedar spray motif and visible light-mode Morphous Cedar Spray board are references.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Cedar Spray". It must feel like the same stable infrastructure system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible cedar spray motif and the visible light-mode board.
Reference use: Use the visible cedar spray motif and light-mode board as references. Preserve blue-green cedar primary controls, deep cedar-shadow navigation, cedar-brown bark selected and focus accents, forest-neutral surfaces, overlapping needle texture, 8px radius language, compact dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, and English plus Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cedar Spray, Dark Mode, Cedar Branch, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: deepest cedar shadow background, blue-green cedar primary, misted spruce-blue surfaces, bark brown accents, lichen pale text, forest slate borders, moss success, glacier teal info, amber bark warning, cedar ember danger, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: stable infrastructure product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use an efficient grotesk or humanist sans for interface headings and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for Japanese headings, body, labels, search, monitoring, tables, forms, command palette, audit logs, and incident status. Include short Japanese labels such as 基盤, 検索, 状態, 記録, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, uptime chart, service dependency graph, throughput bars, infrastructure table, audit log table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple restrained icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Visual details: dark background derived from cedar needle shadows, elevated panels in deep forest slate, lichen and mist foreground text, blue-green primary actions, cedar-bark focus rings, moss and glacier status accents, subtle layered cedar-needle texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Cedar Spray", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
